prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the photo into a stylized anime street-art illustration while keeping the same subject, pose, outfit, headphones, backpack, and graffiti-wall setting. Replace the obscured real face with a clean original anime girl face, with a short blonde bob and side-swept bangs, and make the expression calm and slightly aloof. Keep the oversized yellow hoodie and black-and-white sneakers, but simplify the clothing into bold cel-shaded shapes with thick black ink outlines. Change the object in the raised hand from touching the headphones to holding a small blue spray-paint can near the face. Intensify the wall colors into vivid cyan, hot pink, and yellow graffiti splashes, and render the whole image in a dynamic manga/pop-art style with high contrast, sketchy linework, and a slightly low-angle full-body composition.
